features.name: gridfinity_base_grid
features.description: 2x1 stepped chamfer base profile for baseplate interlock, with bridge plate connecting the two base units. Profile: 0.8mm chamfer, 1.8mm vertical wall, 2.15mm chamfer.

features.name: bin_body_solid
features.description: Solid outer block from Z=0 to Z=84mm. The through-pocket is the only interior void. Pocket walls are 6.75mm (X sides) and 11.75mm (Y sides) of solid material.

features.name: through_pocket
features.description: Single 70x18mm rectangular slot from floor (Z=7.2) through stacking lip (Z=88.4). Caliper drops in display-body-first, rests on floor. Beam extends up and out. No ledge, no lid.

features.name: stacking_lip
features.description: Standard Gridfinity stacking lip profile (4.4mm tall, 2.6mm depth). 0.7mm catch at 45 deg, 1.8mm vertical, 1.9mm at 45 deg. The through-pocket cuts through this lip.

printOrientation.bed_face: bin base (bottom of Gridfinity base profile)
printOrientation.z_direction: upward from base to stacking lip
